title: RedStoneCraftS
description: This mod has added some things, such as Divine Gold, Hammer, etc., to bring a richer experience to the game.
body:
这是一个武器和工具的模组，他添加了一些物品，比如红铁合金，神金，还有对应的工具等，和锤子，红铁合金装备对标钻石装备，而神金装备则对标下界合金装备，可以让早期发展速度加快，但由于不能升级，耐久较低，所以并不影响游戏平衡，但仍可以成为游戏早期和中期的得力工具！虽然本模组仍处于早起开发阶段，不过依旧可以正常游玩！



This is a mod for weapons and tools, which adds some items such as red iron alloy, divine gold, and corresponding tools. It matches diamond equipment with hammers and red iron alloy equipment, while divine gold equipment matches lower bound alloy equipment, which can accelerate early development speed. However, because it cannot be upgraded and has low durability, it does not affect game balance, but it can still be a powerful tool in the early and middle stages of the game! Although this mod is still in the early development stage, it can still be played normally!
